raw_response:
```json
{
  "summary": "The technician resolved unhealthy Nextcloud AIO Docker containers on a Linux server by configuring iSCSI storage. This involved logging into the iSCSI target, mounting the iSCSI disk persistently, deploying a Nextcloud container, modifying its configuration to use the new mount point, and restarting the relevant Docker services, which brought all Nextcloud containers back to a healthy state.",
  "session_type": "configuration",
  "actions_taken": [
    "Checked the status of running Docker containers using `sudo docker ps`, identifying unhealthy Nextcloud AIO containers.",
    "Pinged the iSCSI target IP address (10.7.9.250) to verify connectivity.",
    "Logged into the iSCSI target using `sudo iscsiadm -m discovery -t -p 10.7.9.250`.",
    "Identified disk partitions for the iSCSI target using `sudo lsblk` and `sudo blkid /dev/sdb1`.",
    "Mounted the iSCSI target partition `/dev/sdb1` to `/mnt/VAF-MD-NC`.",
    "Verified the disk mount using `df -h`.",
    "Added a persistent mount entry for the iSCSI disk to `/etc/fstab` using `sudo vim /etc/fstab`.",
    "Constructed a `sudo docker run` command to deploy a `nextcloud_aio_nextcloud` container, mounting the `/mnt/VAF-MD-NC/groupfolders` directory.",
    "Executed the `sudo docker run` command, which pulled the `nextcloud:latest` image.",
    "Accessed the Nextcloud container's bash shell using `sudo docker exec -it nextcloud-aio-nextcloud bash`.",
    "Edited the Nextcloud configuration file `/var/lib/docker/volumes/nextcloud_aio_nextcloud/_data/config/config.php` to change the `datadirectory` to `/mnt/VAF-MD-NC/groupfolders`.",
    "Restarted the `nextcloud-aio-nextcloud` Docker container using `sudo docker restart nextcloud-aio-nextcloud`.",
    "Verified the contents of the mounted groupfolders directory within the container using `ls -lhrt /mnt/VAF-MD-NC/groupfolders`.",
    "Restarted the Docker service using `sudo systemctl restart docker`.",
    "Re-checked the status of all Docker containers, confirming `nextcloud-aio-apache` and `nextcloud-aio-nextcloud` were now healthy."
  ],
  "applications_used": [
    "PuTTY",
    "Notepad"
  ],
  "issues_observed": [
    "Nextcloud AIO Docker containers (`nextcloud-aio-apache` and `nextcloud-aio-nextcloud`) were reported as 'unhealthy' at the beginning of the session."
  ],
  "issues_resolved": [
    "All Nextcloud AIO Docker containers (`nextcloud-aio-apache` and `nextcloud-aio-nextcloud`) were successfully restarted and reported as 'healthy'."
  ],
  "machines_touched": [
    "TE-DC-MD-NC-02",
    "10.7.9.250"
  ],
  "notable_events": [
    "The technician used Notepad on the local Windows machine to draft the `docker run` command, which then caused a brief struggle with copy-pasting into PuTTY due to multi-line handling."
  ],
  "concerns": [],
  "estimated_productivity": "high",
  "tech_performance": {
    "appeared_stuck": true,
    "stuck_details": [
      "The technician appeared stuck for approximately 10-15 seconds (01:31-01:45) when attempting to execute a `docker run` command that was copied from Notepad. The issue seemed to stem from multi-line pasting, leading to an incorrect command structure initially. The technician resolved this by re-copying or carefully adjusting the command."
    ],
    "idle_gaps": [],
    "idle_gap_count": 0,
    "longest_idle_seconds": 0,
    "total_idle_estimate_seconds": 0,
    "efficiency_notes": "The technician demonstrated a methodical approach, starting with problem identification, moving to storage configuration, then container deployment and configuration. The brief hiccup with the `docker run` command was quickly diagnosed and resolved, maintaining a high level of efficiency.",
    "coaching_flags": []
  }
}

{
  "summary": "The technician addressed an issue with unhealthy Nextcloud AIO Docker containers on a Linux server by configuring an iSCSI mount for data storage. This involved logging into the iSCSI target, mounting the storage, updating the Nextcloud container's configuration to use the new mount point, and restarting the Docker services and Nextcloud container, successfully restoring all Nextcloud containers to a healthy state.",
  "session_type": "configuration",
  "actions_taken": [
    "Checked current Docker container statuses using `sudo docker ps` to identify unhealthy Nextcloud AIO components.",
    "Verified network connectivity to the iSCSI target (10.7.9.250) using `ping`.",
    "Logged into the iSCSI target from the Linux server using `sudo iscsiadm -m discovery -t -p 10.7.9.250`.",
    "Identified available block devices and partitions using `sudo lsblk` and `sudo blkid /dev/sdb1`.",
    "Mounted the iSCSI target partition (`/dev/sdb1`) to the designated mount point `/mnt/VAF-MD-NC`.",
    "Confirmed the successful mount and disk usage with `df -h`.",
    "Edited `/etc/fstab` using `sudo vim /etc/fstab` to add an entry for persistent mounting of the iSCSI volume.",
    "Prepared a `docker run` command in Notepad on the client machine to create a new `nextcloud_aio_nextcloud` container, specifying a volume mount to the new iSCSI storage.",
    "Executed the `sudo docker run` command, which initiated the download and deployment of the Nextcloud Docker image.",
    "Accessed the shell within the newly created Nextcloud container using `sudo docker exec -it nextcloud-aio-nextcloud bash`.",
    "Modified the `datadirectory` path in the Nextcloud configuration file (`/var/lib/docker/volumes/nextcloud_aio_nextcloud/_data/config/config.php`) to point to the iSCSI-mounted location (`/mnt/VAF-MD-NC/groupfolders`).",
    "Restarted the `nextcloud-aio-nextcloud` Docker container using `sudo docker restart nextcloud-aio-nextcloud`.",
    "Verified the accessibility and content of the mounted storage within the container using `ls -lhrt /mnt/VAF-MD-NC/groupfolders`.",
    "Restarted the entire Docker service on the host machine using `sudo systemctl restart docker`.",
    "Performed a final check of Docker container statuses to confirm all Nextcloud AIO containers were operating healthily."
  ],
  "applications_used": [
    "PuTTY",
    "Notepad"
  ],
  "issues_observed": [
    "Initially, the `nextcloud-aio-apache` and `nextcloud-aio-nextcloud` Docker containers were observed to be in an 'unhealthy' state."
  ],
  "issues_resolved": [
    "Both the `nextcloud-aio-apache` and `nextcloud-aio-nextcloud` Docker containers were successfully restarted and verified to be running in a 'healthy' state."
  ],
  "machines_touched": [
    "TE-DC-MD-NC-02",
    "10.7.9.250",
    "iqn.2004-04.com.qnapits-ec880uiscsi.vaf-md-nc.2cb40e"
  ],
  "notable_events": [
    "The technician used Notepad on the local Windows machine to compose a complex Docker command. When copying this multi-line command to PuTTY, there was a brief period of trial and error (approx. 01:31 - 01:45) before it was correctly executed, suggesting a minor copy-paste issue."
  ],
  "concerns": [],
  "estimated_productivity": "high",
  "tech_performance": {
    "appeared_stuck": true,
    "stuck_details": [
      "The technician seemed momentarily stuck when attempting to paste and execute the `docker run` command (approx. 01:31 - 01:45). This was likely due to how the multi-line text was copied from Notepad and pasted into the PuTTY terminal, requiring several attempts to get the command correctly formatted and executed."
    ],

    "total_idle_estimate_seconds": 0,
